title: Bee Removal in Brooklyn Heights | $350 – $550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Brooklyn Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction $350 – $550. Experienced local technicians. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Brooklyn Heights residents facing bee infestations need fast, safe, and humane removal services. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in bee removal throughout Brooklyn Heights, protecting your historic brownstone or modern apartment from unwanted hives. Our expert technicians provide comprehensive bee extraction services starting at $350 – $550, ensuring your property remains safe and bee-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Brooklyn Heights for years, understanding the unique challenges of bee removal in this historic neighborhood's diverse architecture. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly methods to safely relocate bees while protecting your family, pets, and the structural integrity of your brownstone or co-op building.
localContext: Brooklyn Heights' tree-lined streets, proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park, and mix of 19th-century brownstones and pre-war buildings create ideal conditions for bee colonies in chimneys, eaves, and garden areas. The neighborhood's protected historic status requires careful, professional pest control that preserves architectural details while effectively removing bee infestations.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Brooklyn Heights typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the hive, accessibility, and whether the colony is in a wall, chimney, or exterior location. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for historic Brooklyn Heights brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are trained to work carefully in historic buildings. We use non-invasive methods that protect original architectural features, masonry, and woodwork while completely removing bee colonies and honeycombs to prevent future infestations or structural damage.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services in Brooklyn Heights. Once you contact us, we can typically schedule an inspection within hours and complete most bee removals within 24-48 hours, depending on the complexity and location of the hive.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate bee colonies rather than exterminating them, as bees are essential pollinators. Our technicians work with local beekeepers to rehome colonies safely. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or aggressive species, we use targeted treatments as a last resort.
